name: Italian Beans Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 large carrots, cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the garlic and onion until soft.
2. Add the beans (from their entire cans) and diced tomatoes, along with 3 cups of water.
3. When hot, add the Italian seasoning. Bring to a boil.
4. Cook until the spices are well-blended.
5. Add the pasta, carrots, and celery. Cook until the pasta is ready, about ten minutes. The carrots should be slightly crunchy.
6. Adjust seasonings if desired. This makes a thick stew. If you prefer it wetter, use more water.
